title: Operation Fairness Engine
description: Workload Index (WLI) = Staff Units ÷ Station Avg on same day — Zero Cost SQL-only Engine
burnoutFlag: Burnout Flag — Warning (WLI >1.5 for 3 consecutive days)
burnoutDescription: Automatic detection — Adds internal notification in /system-health
noBurnout: No burnout cases detected — all staff are balanced.
noData: No data found — start assigning tasks at stations
accessDenied: Access denied. Owner and Ops Manager only.
viewBurnoutRisk: Creating burnout alerts from v_burnout_risk view
